title: Relationship Manager – Onshore Wealth
description:
Relationship Manager – Onshore Wealth

A leading international financial institution with a long-standing presence in Asia is seeking an experienced Onshore Relationship Manager to join its Singapore-based wealth management team.

This role is suited for a commercially driven professional who thrives on client acquisition, builds long-term relationships with affluent individuals, and delivers holistic wealth solutions in a highly regulated onshore environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Acquire, manage, and grow a portfolio of high-net-worth clients based in Singapore

  • Drive new client onboarding through proactive prospecting, referrals, and network development

  • Deliver comprehensive wealth management solutions including investments, lending, insurance, and advisory services

  • Act as the primary point of contact for clients, ensuring high service standards and long-term engagement

  • Collaborate closely with product specialists and internal partners to provide tailored financial strategies

  • Ensure full compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and risk standards

Requirements

  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in onshore wealth or private banking

  • Solid understanding of investment products and wealth planning solutions

  • Familiarity with Singapore’s regulatory and compliance framework

  • Strong communication, relationship-building, and advisory skills

  • Ideal candidate profile: 7–10 years of experience, typically mid-career level

Why Join

  • Join a globally respected financial institution with a strong onshore franchise

  • Access to a broad platform of investment and advisory capabilities

  • Structured career progression within wealth management

  • Competitive remuneration with performance-based incentives

All applications will be treated with strict confidentiality.

EA Licence: R1110891 | Licence No.: 24S2411

postedCompany.description:
We’re LMA, a professional recruitment agency that’s powered by curiosity. We’re here to create better outcomes for clients and jobseekers all around the world, by asking better, more meaningful questions that lead to positive change, for their companies, and their careers.

For our clients it gives us the ability to know your company better. To understand what ‘cultural fit’ really means. To find the candidate that’s ready for next, as well as right now.

For the candidates we serve, our curiosity drives deeper relationships, getting to know the real you, and not the you that only exists on paper. We operate within the finance, banking & financial services, human resources, operations, business support sectors across the UK, Asia and the US.
